title: Clarify that agents/containers are optional for solo use
description: New users are immediately confused by agent identity, SSH keys, containers, and locks — features designed for multi-agent coordination. Daniel Lowd asked 'Do I have agents? Do I need agents? What is the SSH key for? Should I be putting things in Docker containers?' For single-user workflows these are all optional but nothing in the UX signals that. Need to either: (a) defer agent init until multi-agent features are actually needed, (b) clearly label agent/container features as 'multi-agent only' in help text, or (c) add a simpler init path that skips agent identity. Ref: bsky thread lowd.cc/3mh4vf3fias2x
